message:
test: add tests for ChangelogAccordion, FeaturedBadge, ViewTransitionLink

3 new test files covering 32 tests:
- ChangelogAccordion: empty state, expand/collapse, version sorting, type badges, ARIA
- FeaturedBadge/StaffPickBadge/SpotlightBadge/ConditionalFeaturedBadge: label rendering,
  showLabel toggle, conditional rendering, all feature types
- ViewTransitionLink: rendering, click navigation, modifier key bypass, external link
  bypass, noTransition prop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
